privileged_info_summary: The task export_jpeg@1 uses real Unsplash images (not synthetic). Primary image: 1000x667 pixels. Key discrepancies between README documentation and verifier implementation: README claims SSIM threshold ≥ 0.90 but implementation uses 0.85; README claims quality range 70-95 but verifier accepts 60-100; README claims compression 20-60% but verifier checks 20-70%. Recommended quality setting of 85 is correctly documented and accepted by verifier. Task uses 120-second timeout and 8 max steps with sparse reward type. No 'metadata' field exists in task.json (only configuration fields).
